title: Prehistoric World By SpicySushiGamingYT
description: A Minecraft mod that adds dinosaurs, lab equipment, and more.
body:
This mod introduces a world of dinosaurs, complete with a comprehensive dino guidebook, dino blood samples, DNA sequences, and dino bones that can be used to create dino eggs. It also includes two fully functional planes for exploration, along with custom soundtrack and art pieces to enhance the atmosphere. Additionally, a full set of lab equipment is provided for conducting experiments and advancing your dinosaur research.

# **Dinosaurs**
Allosaurus, Ankylosaurus, Baryonyx, Carnotaurus, Compsognathus, Dilophosaurus, Diplodocus, Dryosaurus, Eoraptor, Giganotosaurus, Khaan, Micropachycephalosaurus, Nigersaurus, Pachycephalosaurus, Parasaurolophus, Saurophaganax, Stygimoloch, Stenopelix, Spinosaurus, Triceratops, Tyrannosaurus rex, Utahraptor, Velociraptor, Yinlong.
## **Hybrids**
Nexosaur(Unnatural Lizard).


Please note that this mod is still in early stages and most things still need to added and/or modified.
